title: 677. Map Sum Pairs
question:
Implement a MapSum class with insert, and sum methods.

For the method insert, you'll be given a pair of (string, integer). The string represents the key and the integer represents the value. If the key already existed, then the original key-value pair will be overridden to the new one.

For the method sum, you'll be given a string representing the prefix, and you need to return the sum of all the pairs' value whose key starts with the prefix.

Example 1:

Input: insert("apple", 3), Output: Null
Input: sum("ap"), Output: 3
Input: insert("app", 2), Output: Null
Input: sum("ap"), Output: 5
code: class MapSum(object):\u000A    \u000A    # trie DP\u000A    def __init__(self):\u000A        self.trie \u003D {}\u000A        self.cost \u003D {}\u000A        \u000A    def insert(self, key, val):\u000A        delta \u003D val \u002D self.cost.get(key, 0)\u000A        self.cost[key] \u003D val\u000A        cur \u003D self.trie\u000A        for char in key:\u000A            cur \u003D cur.setdefault(char,{})\u000A            cur[\u0027val\u0027] \u003D cur.setdefault(\u0027val\u0027, 0) + delta\u000A\u000A    def sum(self, prefix):\u000A        cur \u003D self.trie\u000A        for char in prefix:\u000A            if char in cur: cur \u003D cur[char]\u000A            else: return 0\u000A        return cur[\u0027val\u0027]\u000A\u000A    # trie traverse\u000A    def ___init__(self):\u000A        self.trie \u003D {}\u000A        \u000A    def _insert(self, key, val):\u000A        cur \u003D self.trie\u000A        for char in key:\u000A            cur \u003D cur.setdefault(char, {})\u000A        cur[\u0027val\u0027] \u003D val\u000A\u000A    def _sum(self, prefix):\u000A        cur \u003D self.trie\u000A        for char in prefix:\u000A            if char in cur: cur \u003D cur[char]\u000A            else: return 0\u000A        \u000A        bfs \u003D [cur]\u000A        total \u003D 0\u000A        while bfs:\u000A            bfs \u003D [node[child] for node in bfs for child in node]\u000A            total +\u003D sum((i for i in bfs if type(i) \u003D\u003D int) or (0,))\u000A            bfs \u003D filter(lambda x: type(x) \u003D\u003D dict, bfs)\u000A            \u000A        return total\u000A\u000A# Your MapSum object will be instantiated and called as such:\u000A# obj \u003D MapSum()\u000A# obj.insert(key,val)\u000A# param_2 \u003D obj.sum(prefix)
